caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard sits in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a silver boom arm, which features the text "Rode" on the microphone body and "Rode" on the arm. The background consists of grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. Across the sequence, the man adjusts his headphones with his right hand. He starts by bringing his hand up toward the side of the headphones, then moves his hand quickly away, creating a motion blur. He then reaches back to touch the headphone cup and finally rests his hand near the top of the headphones while closing his eyes and tilting his head slightly. His left arm, which is heavily tattooed, is partially visible on the left side of the frame.
